utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 items appear. Check full specification: Each of the first three coverages includes type (health/property/travel), a plan name, details describing coverage, and a cost with currency/timeframe, satisfying 'with costs'. Additional_services includes details and states cost as included; that qualifies as costs. Total_budget provides a breakdown and both total monthly and annual costs. Therefore, all items are present and fully specified with the required details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three items: PrimeCare Premium Package (health), PrimeHome Premium Coverage (property), and PrimeTravel Premium Plan (travel). In the ground-truth ratings, the closest matching names are PrimeCare Premium Plan (health), PrimeHome Premium Coverage (property), and PrimeTravel Premium Plan (travel).
